user_prompt: Help me a charging the Hellhound
prayer:
Approach the mighty Hellhound with reverence, mechadendrites humming the Hymn of Ignition.
Beseech the Omnissiah to awaken its Machine Spirit for the sacred charging.
Anoint the fuel conduits and power relays of the Hellhound with blessed unguents.
Initiate the charging sequence, invoking stability upon its voracious reactors.
Verify the Hellhound's vitality through auspex chants as energies surge pure.

Kneel before the narthecium in solemnity, whispering the Rite of Repose.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the narthecium to accept graceful shutdown.
Disconnect sacred servo-links whilst reciting the Canticle of Dormancy.
Seal the narthecium's vital ports with wards against daemonic ingress.
Confirm the shutdown through diagnostic litanies, honouring the Omnissiah's will.

Present offerings of incense to the narthecium's altar of flesh-mending.
Chant the Benediction of Functionality to rouse its Machine Spirit for operation.
Calibrate the narthecium's injectors and blades under Omnissiah's gaze.
Commence operation with sanctified mechadendrites guiding each incision.
Monitor the narthecium's precision, praising its flawless ministration.

Affirm the long las's lethal harmony through firing litanies of proof.
